owner: Columbia Basin Research, University of Washington
auth_access_model: The current scaffold uses public page surfaces with no auth requirement.

discovery_search.note: The catalog skill provides page discovery across key DART surfaces.

metadata_schema.note: No structured schema or parameter contract is modeled.

entity_lookup.note: No canonical entity lookup is implemented.

identifier_crosswalks.note: Cross-system identifier mapping is not implemented.

abundance_assessment.note: Adult-passage surfaces are discoverable, but no structured extraction workflow exists.

telemetry_passage.note: Passage and PIT-oriented pages are discoverable, but not yet extracted into structured records.

harvest_fishery.note: Harvest and fishery workflows are not implemented.

genetics_gsi.note: Genetics and GSI workflows are not implemented.

provenance_versioning.note: The scaffold does not expose version or provenance contracts for DART pages.

bulk_access_api_ergonomics.note: Public surfaces are easy to reach, but the current skill is page-discovery only.

blockers: The skill is a catalog helper rather than a structured extractor.
Page-level HTML discovery leaves parameter and schema handling implicit.
governance_constraints: The current public-page workflow is open, but downstream structured reuse still depends on page stability.
